news.title: Target says it's on track to end its sales slump after another lackluster quarter
news.summary: The big-box retailer posted its fiscal fourth-quarter results as it hosted an investor meeting at its Minneapolis headquarters. The big- box retailer Target posted its Fiscal fourth- quarter results on Thursday.

news.title: Pinterest shares pop 8% as activist Elliott Management takes $1 billion stake
news.summary: Pinterest's stock has plummeted this year as the social media company grapples with slowing growth and advertising competition. The company's stock is down more than 40% this year.

news.title: Swiss sneaker maker falls 11% after record sales, as guidance falls short of expectations
news.summary: On is entering its third and final year of its strategy to double sales by 2026. The company wants to "be the most premium global sportswear brand"

news.title: Versant debut earnings report shows continued pay TV pressure, digital growth
news.summary: Versant reported its 2025 earnings, giving Wall Street its first detailed look inside the company. Versant started publicly trading in January and is valued at more than $10 billion.

news.title: Best Buy’s holiday sales disappoint, but retailer shows progress in growing profits
news.summary: Best Buy beat fourth-quarter earnings expectations but missed Wall Street's revenue estimates. Best Buy also missed fourth- quarter revenue estimates but beat earnings expectations.

news.title: The global economy is facing untold damage even if the Iran conflict ends tomorrow, warns this energy-industry expert
news.summary: Investors are failing to grasp the enormity of the fallout from U.S. and Israel attacks on Iran, says this energy expert.

news.title: How Applied Optoelectronics became the latest viral AI stock
news.summary: Shares of optical-networking provider have nearly tripled so far this year. AI players seek out high-bandwidth, low-latency connectivity products.

news.title: Why Best Buy’s stock is soaring, even as sales and full-year outlook disappoint
news.summary: Best Buy's earnings beat was enough to please investors, who had low expectations ahead of the retailer’s quarterly results. Best Buy's quarterly results were better than expected.

news.title: Forget the oil spike — the Iran conflict could unlock a generational Middle East peace dividend
news.summary: America’s attack supports the case for U.S. assets. It's also bullish for Iran. America's attack is a good thing for Iran, writes CNN's John Sutter.

news.title: Trump has less than 30 days to end the Iran conflict or he’ll lose his inflation battle
news.summary: Markets expect a “Venezuela II’ scenario in which the bad guy falls, order returns and oil drifts lower. The Venezuelan government has been in turmoil for more than a year.
